page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.large is an entry-level general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 2 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate moderate single-core capabilities but limited multi-core scaling. The single-core stress-ng and Geekbench scores fall within the average range, supported by hardware-accelerated instructions such as AVX and AVX512F. However, multi-core benchmarks, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core, register in the bottom 10% of tested servers. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with uncached read and write speeds of approximately 14.71 GB/sec and 13.41 GB/sec respectively, placing memory performance in the bottom 10% to 25% tier.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation but lower overall multi-threaded and memory throughput, this instance offers a cost-effective option for workloads that do not require high parallel processing power or massive memory bandwidth. It is suitable for lightweight general-purpose applications, basic web serving, single-threaded task processing, and development or testing environments. It is less suitable for memory-intensive databases, high-throughput web serving, or parallelized computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.large is a general-purpose virtual instance featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, relying on a 1 Gbps baseline network interface. Benchmark data shows average single-core performance, supported by AVX and AVX512F instruction sets, but poor multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth, both ranking in the bottom 10% of tested servers. Consequently, this instance represents a budget-friendly option for low-intensity, single-threaded workloads. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, basic application hosting, and development environments where high parallel processing and memory throughput are not critical.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.large is a general-purpose instance with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for lightweight single-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.large features 2 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 8.0 GB RAM, offering entry-level general-purpose performance.
tagline: An entry-level, dedicated dual-core virtual server designed for lightweight single-threaded applications and basic development environments.

8.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No local storage; requires network-attached storage
Average single-core performance with AVX and AVX512F support
Best suited for lightweight web serving and development environments
